title: Agent Manifest (agent.yaml)
description: Schema for agent.yaml: the canonical agent definition metadata. Used for agent-definition targets in agentquilt.config.yaml.

description.description: Human-readable purpose of this agent. Required.

name.description: Optional agent name. Defaults to the agent directory name if not provided.

oneOf.description: Shorthand tier. Resolves to concrete model per platform via modelTiers in agentquilt.config.yaml. 'inherit' omits the model field from generated output.

reasoning.description: Model reasoning effort (if supported by the platform).

model.description: Model configuration: tier shorthand or expanded object. Optional.

permissions.description: Permission level for this agent. Defaults to 'read-only' if not provided. Maps to tool sets or API access levels per platform.

additionalProperties.description: Platform-specific extension blocks (e.g., x-claude, x-codex) are accepted and passed through verbatim to adapters. Keys must start with 'x-' to indicate extensions.
